ns0:entry.ns0:title: 0Chencc/clawgod
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/0Chencc/clawgod
Language: html
This is NOT a third-party Claude Code client. ClawGod is a runtime patch applied on top of the official Claude Code. It works with any version — as Claude Code updates, the patch continues to take effect

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AhmadIbrahiim/Website-downloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AhmadIbrahiim/Website-downloader
Language: html
💡 Download the complete source code of any website (including all assets). [ Javascripts, Stylesheets, Images ] using Node.js

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
Language: html
DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SAPTARSHI-coder/EaseMotion-css
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SAPTARSHI-coder/EaseMotion-css
Language: html
Animation-first CSS framework with reusable UI components, modern effects, and zero dependencies. Lightweight, beginner-friendly, and open-source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide
Language: html
A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/darwin-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/darwin-skill
Language: html
达尔文.skill —— 一个让你的Skill无限进化的系统：评估→改进→测试→保留或回滚 | Autoresearch-inspired autonomous skill optimization for Claude Code. Evaluate, improve, test, keep or revert.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/huashu-design
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design
Language: html
Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
Language: html
A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liguodongiot/llm-action
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liguodongiot/llm-action
Language: html
本项目旨在分享大模型相关技术原理以及实战经验（大模型工程化、大模型应用落地）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
Language: html
AI-agent Skill for generating polished HTML slide decks: editorial magazine and Swiss layouts, image prompts, social covers, and a WebGL/low-power presentation runtime.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pedrohcgs/claude-code-my-workflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pedrohcgs/claude-code-my-workflow
Language: html
A ready-to-fork Claude Code template for academics using LaTeX/Beamer + R. Multi-agent review, quality gates, adversarial QA, and replication protocols.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: techjarves/USB-Uncensored-LLM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techjarves/USB-Uncensored-LLM
Language: html
The ultimate zero-install, portable local AI environment. Run high-quality, uncensored LLMs (Gemma, Qwen, NemoMix) directly from any USB drive or SSD. Fully air-gapped, cross-platform (Win/Mac/Linux), and privacy-first with persistent chat history.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wangwangit/SubsTracker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wangwangit/SubsTracker
Language: html
基于Cloudflare Workers的轻量级订阅管理系统，帮助您轻松跟踪各类订阅服务的到期时间，并通过Telegram发送及时提醒。
